message.content:
{"overallAssessment":"Good job! You communicated effectively in this workplace scenario. You showed willingness to express yourself in English despite some grammar mistakes. --- 做得不错！你在工作场景中有效沟通。尽管有一些语法错误，你展现了用英语表达自己的意愿。","errorSummary":"GRAMMAR: 4 errors (past tense, subject-verb agreement, infinitive)
CHINGLISH: 1 error (missing subject 'it')
WORD_CHOICE: 1 error (people should be staff)","vocabularySuggestions":"1. 'staff' instead of 'people' for workplace context
2. 'difficult' instead of 'hard' for more formal tone
3. 'completed' instead of 'finished' for professional settings","fluencyScore":7,"keyTakeaway":"Focus on past tense consistency when talking about yesterday's events. Pay attention to subject-verb agreement in third person. --- 重点练习过去时态的一致性，以及第三人称的主谓一致。"}
